title: SAFE FAMILIES FOR CHILDREN - 211info
text: SAFE FAMILIES FOR CHILDREN SAFE FAMILIES FOR CHILDREN Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides temporary, short-term host homes through a network of vetted volunteer families, allowing parents in crisis to safely place their children while they receive support to address challenging situations without fear of custody loss 12520 SW 3rd Street Beaverton, OR 97005 Eligibility: Cannot host children with signficant medical or behavioral needs Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-9pm, Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 906-1027 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 906-1027 Admin Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information. Family or partner can complete a referral form online. Program may have a waitlist. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Consent forms at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, Washington, and Polk Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm Services: Children's Out of Home Respite Care If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SAFE FAMILIES FOR CHILDREN
